holdings.infoBox: BUYZ is an equity ETF with a total of 59 individual holdings. The top holdings are Amazon.com stock at 11.27%, Shopify at 8.25%, AppLovin at 5.33%, Alphabet at 4.12%, and Meta Platforms at 4.06%.

overview.description: The Franklin Disruptive Commerce ETF (BUYZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of global equities expecting to benefit from disruptive commerce for consumers and businesses. BUYZ was launched on Feb 25, 2020 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.
